name: md-view-monorepo
description: md.view — Lightweight Markdown viewer (Mac app + Browser webview)

scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:mac: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w apps/mac
scripts.build:all: npm run build:web && npm run build:mac
